message:
fix(spawn): increase registerSessionAgent timeout to accommodate retry backoff

The 5s context was too short for callToolWithBusyRetry's 3 retries with
exponential backoff (500ms+1s+2s). The parent context would expire after
~1.5 retries, defeating the retry mechanism. Increased to 15s to match
the per-pane CreateAgentIdentity timeout.

Refs: #97

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
